visual_description: A man in a beige jacket stands near a hospital bed, holding a curtain partially open, while a woman in a hospital gown lies in bed with her hands behind her head. The man gestures with his free hand as he looks toward the woman, who is looking up at him. Medical equipment and a window with blinds are visible in the background.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking in a quiet environment with no background noise.
